title: MCP Tool Definition
description: Schema for MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool definitions stored as registry artifacts.

name.description: The name of the tool. Must be unique within a server.

description.description: A human-readable description of what the tool does.

version.description: The version of this tool definition.

inputSchema.description: A JSON Schema object defining the expected parameters for the tool.

annotations.description: Optional metadata annotations for the tool.

provider.description: The provider or source of this tool.

category.description: The category this tool belongs to.

requiresAuth.description: Whether the tool requires authentication to use.
